name: Biology

items.title: Cellular and Molecular Biology and Laboratory
Organismal and Ecological Biology and Laboratory

sections.label: Biology Electives with Labs (4 required; at least 3 must be 200-level or higher)
sections.description: Four biology electives with their associated labs. At least three must be 200-level or higher and designated as major courses.

sections.label: Research Seminar Attendance (junior and senior years)
sections.description: Attendance at research seminars in junior and senior years. Mark when completed.

recommended: PHY-165/165L (Basic Physics I & lab) + PHY-175/175L (Basic Physics II & lab)
PHY-185/185L (General Physics I & lab) + PHY-195/195L (General Physics II & lab)

pathway_notes.premed: ⚠ Pre-Med: Take CHM-121/121L first semester freshman year — the chemistry sequence (CHM-121→122→221→321) must finish before MCAT prep junior year.
pathway_notes.pt_dpt: ⚠ Pre-PT: Complete Anatomy + Physiology (BIO-215/225 or BIO-103) by end of sophomore year.
pathway_notes.pa: ⚠ Pre-PA: Microbiology (BIO-325) and patient care hours are both required — start accumulating clinical hours by sophomore year.
